hero.title: Our Projects & Portfolio
hero.subtitle: Documentation of various projects, programs, and collaborations we have realized as a manifestation of our commitment to creating real impact through talent development, program management, leadership, and creative solutions.

leadership.title: INDONESIA LEADERSHIP PROJECT
leadership.description: Indonesia Leadership Project is a comprehensive talent development program designed by APR Foundation to produce future Indonesian leaders with global competitiveness. This program focuses on three main pillars.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.description: Building strong leadership capacity through training, mentoring, and real field experience, preparing participants to lead in various sectors.

talent.title: Talent
talent.description: Identifying and developing Indonesia's best talents, providing space for individuals to explore their potential and hone skills relevant to current needs.

future-workforce.title: Future Workforce
future-workforce.description: Preparing the next generation to adapt and contribute optimally amid changing work environments.

government-leadership-training.title: Youth Leadership Development Program
government-leadership-training.subtitle: Empowering 100 young people with leadership, effective communication, and digital governance skills.
government-leadership-training.description: Leadership development program designed to enhance government officials' capacity through learning about integrity leadership, digital governance, strategic communication, and effective decision-making.

baznas-santripreneur.title: Baznas Santripreneur
baznas-santripreneur.subtitle: Empowerment program for Islamic boarding school students through entrepreneurship training, leadership development, and mentoring in building sustainable businesses.
baznas-santripreneur.description: Talent development initiative with BAZNAS aimed at equipping students with entrepreneurial skills, leadership mindsets, and practical experience to create sustainable economic and social impact.

townhall-muda.title: Policy Discussion Forum
townhall-muda.subtitle: A collaborative forum that brings together young people, academics, and key stakeholders to discuss environmental policies and waste management.
townhall-muda.description: Discussion and collaboration initiatives that encourage active youth participation in exchanging ideas, building networks, and creating innovative solutions for social challenges and national development.

agriculture.title: REGENERATIVE AGRICULTURE
agriculture.description: Mudatani is a regenerative agriculture program designed to drive the transformation of Indonesia's agricultural sector through three key pillars:

agripreneurship.title: Agripreneurship
agripreneurship.description: Fostering entrepreneurial spirit in agriculture among Indonesian youth, equipping them with modern agribusiness skills, agricultural technology innovation, and the ability to manage sustainable and profitable farming enterprises.

food-resilience.title: Food Resilience
food-resilience.description: Building national food security through regenerative agricultural practices that maintain soil fertility, reduce dependence on chemicals, and ensure healthy, stable, and environmentally friendly food production for future generations.

sustainable-agriculture.title: Sustainable Agriculture
sustainable-agriculture.description: Promoting the implementation of sustainable agricultural systems through technology utilization, wise natural resource management, and environmentally friendly cultivation practices to increase productivity and farmer welfare.

agri-biochar-2024.title: Routine Maintenance
agri-biochar-2024.subtitle: Carrying out regular plant maintenance through watering, fertilizing, pest control, and growth monitoring to maintain land productivity.

agri-urban-farms.title: Harvest Festival
agri-urban-farms.subtitle: Joint harvest momentum showcasing quality agricultural cultivation results while strengthening collaboration between farmers, communities, and partners.

agri-organic-cocoa.title: Agricultural Marketing
agri-organic-cocoa.subtitle: Supporting farmers in expanding market access through marketing strategies, product value addition, and partnerships with various sectors.

creative.title: CREATIVE MANAGEMENT
creative.description: Creafo is a creative management program from APR Foundation designed to nurture and empower Indonesian creative talents ready to compete in the digital economy era. This program is built on two main pillars:

creative.title: Creative
creative.description: Developing each talent's creative abilities across various creative industry fields, from digital content, design, media production, to storytelling. Each talent is trained to think innovatively, express ideas professionally, and create impactful works.

digital-economy.title: Digital Economy
digital-economy.description: Equipping each talent with a deep understanding of the digital economy ecosystem, including digital marketing strategies, content monetization, platform-based creative business development, and evolving industry trends.

creative-marta-agri.title: ID Next Leader
creative-marta-agri.subtitle: Social media content highlighting the leadership spirit of the younger generation through education, inspiration, and character development to create future Indonesian leaders.

creative-jakarta-green.title: Dedikasi Untuk Negeri
creative-jakarta-green.subtitle: Digital publication featuring stories of dedication, contribution, and inspiration from individuals and communities making positive impacts on society and the nation.

creative-craftsmen-indonesia.title: Beasiswa 10000
creative-craftsmen-indonesia.subtitle: Informative content about scholarship programs aimed at expanding access to education, providing registration information, and encouraging more young people to seize learning opportunities.

creative-craftsmen-indonesia-test.title: Rumah Tempe Indonesia
creative-craftsmen-indonesia-test.subtitle: Promotional and educational content introducing tempe product innovations, production processes, and community empowerment through local food industry development.

videos.title: TVC & Company Profiles
videos.subtitle: Watch our documentaries and videos. Click play to watch.

vid-manifesto-25.title: Waste to Energy - Danantara Indonesia
vid-manifesto-25.description: Corporate video showcasing sustainable waste-to-energy solutions through technological innovation, collaboration, and commitment to environmentally friendly development.

vid-agri-doc.title: BAZNAS Santripreneur 2025 - Haji & Umrah Cluster
vid-agri-doc.description: Documentary video of the Santripreneur program highlighting entrepreneurship development for students in the Haji and Umrah cluster through training, mentoring, and collaboration with BAZNAS.

vid-leadership-keynote.title: Kemendukbangga/BKKBN RI Profile Video
vid-leadership-keynote.description: Institutional profile video introducing the vision, mission, flagship programs, and contributions of Kemendukbangga/BKKBN RI in family and population development in Indonesia.

vid-leadership-keynote2.title: Townhall Muda Teaser - Sustainable Energy
vid-leadership-keynote2.description: Teaser video inviting young people to participate in the Townhall Muda forum with the theme of sustainable energy through discussion, collaboration, and innovation.

vid-leadership-keynote3.title: Cilacap Tourism Ambassador
vid-leadership-keynote3.description: Profile video showcasing tourism potential, culture, and the role of Cilacap Tourism Ambassadors in promoting destinations and local wisdom.

vid-leadership-keynote4.title: MSMEs Rising from Pandemic
vid-leadership-keynote4.description: Inspirational video highlighting the revival stories of MSMEs through innovation, digital adaptation, and collaborative spirit in facing post-pandemic challenges.
